fields.summary: CS Mapping rule config parser should return MappingRule objects
[Umbrella] Reduce the feature gap between FS Placement Rules and CS Queue Mapping rules

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.
status.name: Resolved

issuetype.description: A new feature of the product, which has yet to be developed.
issuetype.name: New Feature

fields.description: As per the design document attached to the umbrella Jira (YARN-10370), we need to change the current configuration parser to create the new object structure when parsing the current mapping rule format. This should be 100% backwards compatible, to make sure upon upgrade all mapping rules will behave the same.

resolution.description: A fix for this issue is checked into the tree and tested.
resolution.name: Fixed

fields.summary: Create MappingRule class to represent each CS mapping rule

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.
status.name: Resolved
